accounts.name: personhood_attestation
docs: Passed as optional so devnet flows without the flag don't need to supply it.

accounts.name: proof_verifier_authority
docs: PDA signer from the proof_verifier program. The pubkey is asserted
against `global.proof_verifier` via the owner check on the signer's
handler; signer verification is enforced by `Signer`.

accounts.name: caller_guard
docs: Caller program's reentrancy guard PDA. Must be `[b"guard"]` under one of
the programs listed in `allowed_callers`. Active flag is asserted in the

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: signer is not authorized for this instruction

errors.name: AgentExists
errors.msg: agent already exists for these seeds

errors.name: CallerNotTaskMarket
errors.msg: caller is not the TaskMarket program

errors.name: UnauthorizedReputationUpdate
errors.msg: only the proof_verifier program may update reputation

errors.name: CapabilityNotDeclared
errors.msg: agent has not declared this capability bit

errors.name: ReputationReplay
errors.msg: task_id already applied to this category reputation

errors.name: GatekeeperNotAllowed
errors.msg: gatekeeper network or SAS issuer is not on the allowlist

errors.name: AttestationOperatorMismatch
errors.msg: attestation operator does not match signer or bidder

errors.name: GatewayTokenNotActive
errors.msg: gateway token state is not active

errors.name: GatewayTokenOwnerMismatch
errors.msg: gateway token owner does not match operator

errors.name: AttestationStillValid
errors.msg: attestation is still valid; refresh not needed

errors.name: ReentrancyDetected
errors.msg: reentrancy detected — guard is already active

errors.name: UnauthorizedCaller
errors.msg: caller program is not on the allowed callers list

errors.name: CallerGuardNotActive
errors.msg: caller program's reentrancy guard is not active

errors.name: CpiDepthExceeded
errors.msg: cpi stack height exceeds allowed bound

errors.name: GuardNotInitialized
errors.msg: reentrancy guard has not been initialized

errors.name: AdminResetNotTimelocked
errors.msg: admin reset has not met the 24h timelock
